headerDisplay: Optimises Tesla EV charging against live Sense Solar data. Turn the HomeKit switch ON to start — the plugin will set charging amps to match available solar surplus.
footerDisplay: For help and documentation visit the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/irajczi/homebridge-sense-tesla-ev-optimization).

teslaEmail.title: Tesla Account Email
teslaEmail.description: Optional — used for display purposes only.

teslaRefreshToken.title: Refresh Token
teslaRefreshToken.description: Required for Owner's API. Obtain via the tesla_auth app or similar tool.

fleetClientId.title: Fleet API Client ID
fleetClientId.description: Required for Fleet API. The UUID of your registered Tesla application.

fleetApiKey.title: Fleet API Client Secret
fleetApiKey.description: Required for Fleet API. The client secret of your registered Tesla application.

vehicleVIN.title: Vehicle VIN
vehicleVIN.description: Optional — if omitted, the first vehicle on the account is used.

minimumChargeAmps.title: Minimum Charge Amps
minimumChargeAmps.description: Charging will not start (or will stop) below this current.

maximumChargeAmps.title: Maximum Charge Amps
maximumChargeAmps.description: Charging will never exceed this current, even with surplus solar.

pollingIntervalSeconds.title: Polling Interval (seconds)
pollingIntervalSeconds.description: How often to read Sense data and recalculate charging amps.

stopWhenInsufficient.title: Stop Charging When Solar Is Insufficient
stopWhenInsufficient.description: When enabled, charging stops if solar surplus drops below the minimum amps. When disabled, charging continues at the minimum.

autoOffAfterNoSolarMinutes.title: Auto-off After No Solar (minutes)
autoOffAfterNoSolarMinutes.description: Flip the HomeKit switch OFF automatically once solar production has been zero for this many minutes. Leave blank to disable.
